final_response_preview:
The macro already existed but had two gaps vs. the success criteria. Fixed both:

1. **`>=` instead of `>`** — now includes the root node itself
2. **`ORDER BY a.start_line, a.start_column`** — results ordered by source position

The core strategy (already correctly in place) exploits DFS pre-order node assignment: all nodes in a subtree rooted at `node_id` have IDs in the contiguous range `[node_id, node_id + descendant_count]`, making this an O(1) range scan with no recursion needed.
